title: The TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro proved to me that budget smartphones can still be great — but I won't be ditching my aging Samsung just yet
summary: The TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro is a solid budget smartphone with a standout feature: its NXTPAPER 4.0 screen. Design-wise, the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro certainly doesn’t feel budget.
caption: output/2026-07-19/the-tcl-nxtpaper-70-pro-proved-to-me-that-budget-smartphones-can-still.txt
